sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Celcuity Breast Cancer Drug Receives FDA Priority Review for 2026
feed.summary: The FDA has granted Priority Review for Celcuity Inc.'s lead breast cancer drug candidate, gedatolisib, with a PDUFA goal date of July 2026. Clinical data for gedatolisib, used in a triplet therapy for HR+/HER2- advanced breast cancer, showed a significant reduction in the risk of disease progression or death by 76% and a median progression-free survival of 9.3 months compared to 2.0 months for standard treatment. The biopharmaceutical firm is now preparing for commercial operations, expanding staff and securing additional financing.

feed.title: Heron sets May 11 webcast for Q1 results and business updates
feed.summary: Heron Therapeutics (Nasdaq: HRTX) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results and discuss business highlights on Monday, May 11, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The event will include a conference call and live webcast accessible through registration on the company's investor relations website, where an archive will also be available for 60 days. Investors are advised to register and dial in 15 minutes early to avoid delays.

feed.title: Corning’s AI Fiber Boom is Real, but Its Stock Price May Be Getting Out of Hand
feed.summary: Corning's stock has more than doubled due to a significant supply deal with Meta Platforms for fiber-optic cables, essential for AI data centers. While the deal derisks Corning's supply expansion, Morningstar analysts believe the stock is overvalued, as the market is pricing Corning as a pure-play AI fiber company, despite optical fiber only representing 30-40% of its total revenue. The company’s growth is currently limited by its capacity to produce fiber, rather than demand.

feed.title: Jennifer Granholm granted 2,737 Edison International (EIX) shares
feed.summary: Edison International director Jennifer M. Granholm was granted 2,737 shares of common stock at no cost upon her re-election at the company's annual meeting. After this transaction, she directly holds 2,737 shares and indirectly holds 40 shares through a family trust. This grant is a form of stock-based compensation for her continued board service.

feed.title: Heron Therapeutics to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Monday, May 11, 2026
feed.summary: Heron Therapeutics announced it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 11, 2026, through a conference call and live webcast. The event, scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET, will also cover recent business highlights. Interested parties can access dial-in details via a registration link or the Investor Relations section of the company's website.

feed.title: Urgent recall of dumbbells sold at US Walmart stores after 115 incidents reported
feed.summary: Tzumi Electronics has recalled 50,000 FitRx SmartBell Adjustable Dumbbells sold at Walmart due to 115 reports of weight plates dislodging and six injuries. Customers are advised to mark and register their dumbbells for a free replacement after disposal. This recall follows other recent product recalls, including heated socks and stainless steel sauté pans, due to safety concerns.

feed.title: Dealers find battle with Carvana, CarMax heating up for inventory
feed.summary: A survey indicates that car dealers are facing increasingly stiff competition from Carvana and CarMax for used-vehicle inventory, making Q1 2026 particularly challenging. The national reach and aggressive bidding strategies of these online retailers contribute to a tight market, forcing traditional dealers to rethink their sourcing and sales approaches. Analyst Jeff Lick emphasizes the need for dealers to adapt to digital selling processes and consider the long-term customer relationship over immediate profit margins on trade-ins.

feed.title: Director at Edison International (NYSE: EIX) receives deferred stock unit grant
feed.summary: Michael C. Camunez, a director at Edison International (EIX), was granted 2,737 Deferred Stock Units upon his re-election. Following this grant and additional units from dividend reinvestment, he now holds a total of 29,010.0092 deferred stock units. These units will generally be settled in common stock upon his retirement or other specified events, tying his compensation to the company's long-term performance.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) Trading 1.6% Higher After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) shares rose 1.6% after Bank of America increased its price target from $605 to $700, maintaining a buy rating, citing strong AI/data-center demand and HAMR technology. Other brokerages also raised their targets due to structural HDD supply tightness, leading to an average "Moderate Buy" rating and a $522.25 price target. However, significant insider selling totaling $46.48 million and a high P/E ratio of 67 could amplify downside risk if upcoming earnings disappoint.

feed.title: A Look at Corning Inc (GLW) After 4.5% Decline -- GF Value $53.2
feed.summary: Corning Inc (GLW) shares recently declined by 4.5% to $168.01, despite a strong year-to-date performance. According to GuruFocus, the stock is significantly overvalued, trading at 215.4% above its GF Value™ of $53.27, and its P/E ratio of 91.3x is much higher than its historical median. Insider selling activity, with $37.1 million in shares sold over the last three months and no buying, further suggests caution for investors.

feed.title: Capital One $425M Settlement: Who Is Eligible for Payout?
feed.summary: Capital One has agreed to a $425 million class-action settlement for allegedly misleading customers about interest rates on its 360 Savings accounts compared to its 360 Performance Savings accounts. Millions of current and former Capital One 360 Savings account holders from September 18, 2019, to June 16, 2025, are eligible for a payout, with payments expected by late July. Individual payouts will vary based on account duration and balance, and eligible customers do not need to file a claim.

feed.title: Brown & Brown, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) reported its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026, with total revenues reaching $1.9 billion, a 35.4% increase year-over-year. Net income attributable to the Company grew by 28.7% to $426 million, and the Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.165 per share.

feed.title: Edison International (NYSE: EIX) director granted 2,737 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Edison International director James T. Morris was granted 2,737 deferred stock units as board compensation, increasing his total holdings to 30,108.9146 units. These units, which convert 1-for-1 to common stock, will be settled upon his retirement, resignation, death, disability, or an elected date. This transaction, resulting from his re-election as a director, aligns his interests with the company's long-term performance.

feed.title: [Form 4] EDISON INTERNATIONAL Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Peter J. Taylor, a director of Edison International (EIX), reported the acquisition of 2,844 deferred stock units via a Form 4 filing. This grant, valued at $0.00 per unit, is compensation for his re-election as a director and re-appointment as Board Chair. These units will be settled in shares upon his retirement or other specified events, bringing his direct holding to 2,844 deferred stock units.

feed.title: A Look At Simon Property Group’s (SPG) Valuation After Its Recent 1 Month Share Price Gain
feed.summary: Simon Property Group (SPG) has seen an 11.6% return in the past month, contributing to a 33.2% return over the last year. Despite this, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is currently undervalued by about 3.5%, with a fair value of $208.55 compared to its recent close of $201.16. The valuation narrative highlights strategic redevelopments and mixed-use environments as drivers for stable rent growth and diversified income streams, though potential risks include higher interest costs and increased retailer bankruptcies.

feed.title: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) holders back pay and plan, reject independent chair
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. shareholders approved all management-backed proposals at their Annual Meeting on April 23, 2026, including the election of all director nominees, ratification of KPMG LLP as auditor, approval of the 2019 Stock Plan, and advisory approval of executive compensation. A shareholder proposal seeking to adopt an independent chair policy failed to pass, receiving significantly fewer votes than those against it. These decisions were formally reported in an 8-K filing.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Shares Down 2.5% After Insider Selling
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) saw its shares drop 2.5% following significant insider selling by CEO Jayshree Ullal, who sold approximately 828,000 shares for about $143 million under a pre-arranged plan between April 20-22. Despite this, analysts maintain a bullish "Buy" consensus with an average price target of $177.83, noting the company's strong recent earnings and high institutional ownership. The stock currently trades at a P/E ratio of 62.5 ahead of its forecasted 3.17 EPS for the current fiscal year.

feed.title: Take-Two rises as investors position for May earnings and potential GTA VI updates
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) stock rose 3.9% today, ahead of its fiscal Q4 and full-year 2026 earnings report scheduled for May 21. Analysts suggest this movement is driven by investor positioning for potential updates on upcoming titles like GTA VI and recent increases in analyst price targets. While insiders have primarily sold shares, institutional investors show mixed activity, and Wall Street analysts maintain bullish ratings with a median price target of $300.0.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) director gets 2,737 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Edison International director Linda G. Stuntz was granted 2,737 deferred stock units (DSUs) upon her re-election, which are compensation and not an open-market transaction. Each DSU is equivalent to one share of common stock and will be settled upon her retirement, resignation, death, or disability. Following this grant, Stuntz directly holds a total of 27,222.0522 DSUs, including those acquired through dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) director Marcy Reed awarded 2,737 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Edison International director Marcy L. Reed was granted 2,737 Deferred Stock Units as compensation for her re-election to the board, as reported in a Form 4 filing. These units are not immediately tradable but represent future economic exposure to EIX stock, with settlement generally occurring upon her retirement or resignation. Following this award and dividend reinvestment, Reed now holds a total of 14,647.0828 deferred stock units.

feed.title: Focus on Disney ETFs Post Q2 Earnings
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Company reported strong Q2 fiscal 2024 earnings, beating Zacks Consensus Estimate by 8.04% with adjusted earnings of $1.21 per share and revenue growth of 1.2%. Despite missing revenue consensus slightly and a subsequent 9% stock dip due to concerns about the theme park division, several ETFs with significant Disney exposure are highlighted as potentially impacted. These include AdvisorShares Gerber Kawasaki ETF (GK), Vanguard Communication Services ETF (VOX), Fidelity MSCI Communication Services Index ETF (FCOM), ALPS Global Travel Beneficiaries ETF (JRNY), and iShares Global Comm Services ETF (IXP).

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities trades lower as potential tenant wind-downs hit Q1 earnings (ARE:NYSE)
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) saw its shares trade lower after reporting reduced first-quarter earnings. The decline is attributed to potential wind-downs by tenants, impacting the healthcare REIT's financial performance. Shares were down 2.00% in after-market trading.

feed.title: Chipotle appoints Fernando Machado as chief brand officer
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill has named Fernando Machado as its new chief brand officer, effective June 1st. Machado, known for his marketing roles at Burger King and Activision Blizzard, will oversee global marketing strategy and brand positioning. This appointment, along with Arlie Sisson as chief digital officer, comes as Chipotle implements its "Recipe for Growth" strategy following recent sales declines.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets Inc. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. (CBOE) stock fell 1.77% on Monday to $298.44, despite a mixed trading session where the S&P 500 Index rose. This decline ended a two-day winning streak for the company's stock. The underperformance was noted when compared to its competitors.

feed.title: Airbnb (NASDAQ: ABNB) awards RSUs and options to strategy chief
feed.summary: Airbnb's Chief Strategy Officer, Nathan Blecharczyk, has been awarded new equity, including 39,204 restricted stock units (RSUs) and a stock option covering 42,004 shares of Class A Common Stock. These awards will vest over several years, with RSUs beginning May 19, 2026, and stock options starting March 19, 2026, and represent compensation for his continued service. Following these transactions, Blecharczyk holds a significant number of Class A shares directly and indirectly through a trust.

feed.title: U.S. Stocks: Dow Inc. Continues Decline, Down 62 Dollars Amid Uncertainty Over U.S.-Iran Talks (27th) ☆ Revised
feed.summary: Dow Inc. experienced a decline of 62 dollars, closing at 53.64 dollars on the New York stock market. This marks the third consecutive day of decline for the company. The drop is attributed to growing uncertainty surrounding the U.S.-Iran nuclear talks and their potential impact on crude oil prices, which could affect the chemical company's profitability.

feed.title: [Form 4] IQVIA HOLDINGS INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. director Sheila A. Stamps reported an acquisition of 1,571 deferred shares, valued at $160.68 per share, as part of her compensation, increasing her direct holdings to 4,210 deferred shares. These shares are convertible into common stock upon her ceasing to be a director, a change in company control, or her death. The transaction, filed as a Form 4, indicates a grant/award and has a neutral sentiment.

feed.title: Costco starts hiring for new Guilderland store as opening approaches this summer
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale has begun hiring for its new store in Guilderland, New York, as it prepares for an August opening. This will be the first Costco location in the Albany area. The company is actively working towards the summer launch of the new retail space.

feed.title: Brown & Brown posts $1.9B in Q1 revenue as organic growth stays flat
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. announced Q1 2026 results with total revenues of $1.9 billion, a 35.4% increase, though organic revenue remained flat. Diluted EPS decreased by 7.8% to $1.06, while adjusted diluted EPS rose by 7.8% to $1.39. The company also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.165 per share.

feed.title: Hillman Solutions Corp. (HLMN) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings: Revenue Miss, Slight Net Loss and Improved Cash Flow
feed.summary: Hillman Solutions Corp. (HLMN) reported Q1 2026 earnings with revenue of $370.1 million, missing consensus estimates by approximately $10.2 million. The company experienced a slight net loss of $4.7 million but showed significant year-over-year improvement in operating cash flow. Insider trading activity included sales from two executives, while institutional investors showed mixed sentiment with some adding and others decreasing their positions.

feed.title: Airbnb (ABNB) CFO receives new RSU and stock option grants
feed.summary: Airbnb's CFO, Elinor Mertz, has been granted 72,806 restricted stock units (RSUs) and stock options for 78,007 shares of Class A common stock. These equity awards are part of her compensation, with RSUs vesting quarterly over four years starting May 19, 2026, and stock options vesting monthly over 48 months starting March 19, 2026, expiring in 2036. The grants are intended to align her interests with the company's long-term performance.

feed.title: Microchip technology CEO Steve Sanghi sells $36.8m in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Steve Sanghi, CEO of Microchip Technology Inc., sold 416,581 shares worth over $36.8 million on April 23, 2026, as part of a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This transaction occurred while the stock was trading near its 52-week high and is considered overvalued by InvestingPro analysis. Sanghi retains a substantial indirect holding of over 9.4 million shares through family trusts.

feed.title: IQVIA (IQV) director John M. Leonard granted 1,571 fully vested shares
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. director John M. Leonard was granted 1,571 fully vested shares of common stock as compensation for his role as a non-employee director. These shares were awarded on April 23, 2026, with no purchase price paid, bringing his direct holdings to 16,946 shares. This transaction is considered a routine equity compensation event rather than a trading signal.

feed.title: Stock award lifts IQVIA (NYSE: IQV) director Danhakl’s indirect holdings
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. director John G. Danhakl received a stock award of 1,571 shares, fully vested upon grant for Non-Employee Directors, which are held indirectly through the Danhakl Revocable Family Trust. Following this transaction, the trust now holds 30,612 shares, with an additional 1,275 shares held by an LLC controlled by the trust. This Form 4 filing reflects a compensation-related grant rather than an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Stock grant lifts IQVIA (NYSE: IQV) director’s holdings to 7,533
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. director Carol Burt reported a stock award of 1,571 shares of common stock, which were fully vested upon grant. These shares are held indirectly in the Carol Burt Hilliard Revocable Trust, increasing her total indirect holdings to 7,533 shares. This transaction was documented in a Form 4 filing and is considered a neutral event for the stock.

feed.title: New Mexico AI campus ditches turbines for fuel cells, cuts water use
feed.summary: Oracle, BorderPlex, and Bloom Energy are collaborating on "Project Jupiter," an AI data center campus in New Mexico that will be powered by up to 2.45 GW of Bloom fuel cells. This initiative replaces traditional gas turbines and diesel generators, significantly reducing NOₓ emissions by approximately 92% and nearly eliminating water usage through a closed-loop cooling system. The project also includes substantial community investments totaling over $400 million and is expected to create 4,000 construction jobs and 1,500 ongoing positions.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Names Chris Samborski Chief Operating Officer
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) has appointed Christopher W. (Chris) Samborski as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective May 1, 2026. This promotion recognizes his extensive experience in operations and finance, and follows the company's record results in 2025. Samborski's new compensation package reflects his strategic importance, while Kirk Light will take over leadership of the West and Specialties Divisions.

feed.title: Southwest puts patriotic jets in the sky and up to $250K into grants
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE: LUV) is celebrating the U.S. 250th anniversary by introducing "Independence One," a new special-issue livery featuring patriotic design elements, which will join its existing America-themed planes, "Freedom One" and "Liberty One." The airline also announced a partnership with America250 for the America Gives initiative and will invest up to $250,000 in a "We Serve Together" grant to support employee-nominated nonprofits, building on their 2025 volunteer hours. Independence One is set to begin service on April 29th, flying from Dallas to Philadelphia, the birthplace of the Declaration of Independence.

feed.title: Dollar Tree Inc. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Dollar Tree Inc. (DLTR) shares declined on Monday, underperforming compared to its competitors in the retail sector and the broader market. Despite the daily loss, the stock remains above its 52-week low.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) reported quarterly earnings of $2.10 EPS, significantly beating analyst estimates, although revenue missed expectations. The company, a real estate investment trust specializing in life science and technology campuses, also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.72 per share, representing a 6.3% yield. Despite the mixed financial results, institutional investors hold a substantial portion of the stock, and analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $63.67.

feed.title: Expedia Group Inc. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Shares of Expedia Group Inc. (EXPE) fell by 2.47% on Monday, closing at $245.22, despite a mixed trading session for the broader stock market. The company's stock underperformed its competitors and was 19.28% below its 52-week high of $303.80, which was reached on January 9th.

feed.title: Nucor (NUE) Q1 2026 earnings jump with record mill shipments and upbeat Q2 view
feed.summary: Nucor Corporation reported robust financial results for Q1 2026, with net sales reaching $9.496 billion and diluted EPS climbing to $3.23, significantly up from the prior year. The company's steel mills segment achieved record quarterly shipments, and all three operating segments displayed sequential earnings growth. Nucor maintains a strong financial position with $2.48 billion in cash and provides an optimistic outlook for Q2 2026, anticipating higher consolidated earnings across all segments.

feed.title: 11,400-share Rule 144 filing for LVS (NYSE: LVS) via Goldman Sachs
feed.summary: A Rule 144 filing has been made for Las Vegas Sands Corp. (NYSE: LVS), indicating an intended sale of 11,400 shares through Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC. The filing details these shares as Common Stock, with acquisition dates for corresponding Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) ranging from 2006 to 2018. This notice is a prerequisite for the sale and does not confirm its completion, with eligibility dependent on meeting Rule 144 conditions.

feed.title: [ARS] GYRE THERAPEUTICS, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an ARS SEC filing by GYRE THERAPEUTICS, INC. The filing, dated April 27, 2026, at 04:31 PM, is categorized with a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides recent news and other SEC filings for Gyre Therapeutics, highlighting its financial results and clinical trial progress.

feed.title: NUCOR ($NUE) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings, Stock Rises
feed.summary: Nucor ($NUE) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates for both earnings per share and revenue, which led to a stock price increase of over 4%. Despite significant insider selling activity, institutional investors showed mixed movements with some adding and others reducing their positions. Analysts maintain a positive outlook with most issuing "Buy" or "Overweight" ratings and a median price target of $190.0.

feed.title: Nucor shares up 4% as strong steel demand and pricing drive Q1 earnings beat
feed.summary: Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) reported first-quarter earnings that surpassed analyst expectations, driven by record steel mill shipments and higher pricing. The company posted adjusted EPS of $3.23 on revenue of $9.5 billion, leading to a 4.3% increase in share price. Nucor expects even higher consolidated earnings in Q2 2026 due to continued strong demand and favorable market conditions.

feed.title: Nucor Stock Jumps On Q1 Earnings Beat: Key Details From The Print
feed.summary: Nucor (NYSE: NUE) reported strong first-quarter results, exceeding analyst expectations for both revenue and earnings per share. The company saw sequential earnings growth across all three operating segments due to strong demand, capital investments, and favorable trade policies. Following the positive report, Nucor's stock rose in after-hours trading.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 15.99M Aptiv shares (APTV) — 7.5% stake (04/27/2026)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing beneficial ownership of 15,992,284 shares of Aptiv PLC (APTV), which represents a 7.50% stake in the company. The filing indicates Vanguard possesses sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 2,129,822 shares. The document, signed by Vanguard's Head of Global Fund Administration on April 27, 2026, details this passive investment.

feed.title: Altria Expands Investment in U.S. Tobacco Communities
feed.summary: Altria Group announced a new initiative to invest over $8 million in U.S. tobacco communities, agricultural research, and education over the next three years. This program, supported by Philip Morris USA, includes establishing endowments at the University of Kentucky and Virginia Tech to support tobacco agronomy and innovation. The investment aims to strengthen agricultural capacity, support growers, and foster industry sustainability, aligning with America's 250th anniversary.

feed.title: UnitedHealth (NYSE: UNH) Optum CEO sells 800 shares in market
feed.summary: Patrick Hugh Conway, Chief Executive Officer of Optum, a subsidiary of UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH), sold 800 shares of company common stock in an open-market transaction. The sale was executed at a price of $355.00 per share, totaling $284,000. Following this transaction, Conway directly holds 17,804.991 shares of UnitedHealth Group common stock.
